meta.title: Leviathan Docs + Sync Snapshot
meta.description: April 10, 2026 status page for docs recovery, autoresearch runs, and sync blocker state.

props.title: Leviathan Docs + Sync Snapshot
props.subtitle: Recovered intent, current docs state, and the exact blocker still in the way
props.meta: Snapshot date: 2026-04-10 · Source of truth: repo + CASS + autoresearch runtime

props.content: The lost thread is recovered. `lev-roadmap` owned the ROADMAP refresh, while broader docs cleanup belonged to the follow-on documentation-management runs. One run finished cleanly at metric 0. The second broader top-docs run was launched, then stopped before its first recorded row. Full repo sync is still blocked by one oversized video file in the `community/agentping` submodule.

props.label: TOP-LEVEL DOCS
props.title: Audit Status by File
props.subtitle: What is healthy, what is stale, and what still needs a deliberate second pass.

rows.truth: Exists in repo and is linked from NORTH_STAR.
No longer frozen at 03-23 / Step 2 of 10.
rows.next: Second-pass run should add broader OMC/top-doc context if intended.

rows.truth: Quick Start exists, but product/install honesty still needs review.
Acts as a router, not a real docs quickstart or boot path.
Still lacks explicit OMC / exec-profile / agent-roster framing.
rows.next: Freshen positioning layer with current runtime language.

rows.truth: Still the strongest top-level doc, but roster/profile ownership is thin.
rows.next: Add ownership-map updates if/when OMC language lands.

rows.truth: Structural destination doc is in decent shape.
rows.next: Use as boundary doc, not task list.

rows.truth: Boot path exists, but docs index does not foreground it as the quickstart/boot route.

props.title: Interpretation
props.content: The real freshness gap is not ROADMAP anymore — it is NORTH_STAR, then ARCHITECTURE. VISION and MANIFESTO are newer. ROADMAP was already repaired in the first pass.

props.label: AUTORESEARCH
props.title: Run Status
props.subtitle: Two related runs, two different outcomes.

rows.scope: Top-level docs: README / docs index / NORTH_STAR / ARCHITECTURE / ROADMAP / MANIFESTO / VISION / bootup

props.title: Recovered from CASS
props.content: The index was already fresh. The lost session history showed the intended two-step plan: **(1)** recover and run the roadmap surface, **then (2)** run `codex-autoresearch documentation management` for the broader docs work.
The bug was not stale indexing. The bug was me collapsing two steps into one. `lev-roadmap` owned the ROADMAP refresh; the rest of the docs audit belonged to the follow-on docs-management loop.

items.title: Prior-art recovery
items.description: Recovered `.claude/skills/lev-roadmap/SKILL.md` as the live roadmap maintenance surface.

items.title: ROADMAP repaired
items.description: `docs/ROADMAP.md` was moved back onto the MVP blocker spine and refreshed to April 7.

items.title: Managed docs run
items.description: Background docs-management loop completed at metric 0 after validator runtime + policy cleanup.

items.title: CASS recovery
items.description: Recovered the lost conversation and restored the correct split between roadmap refresh and broader docs management.

items.title: Top-level docs run
items.description: Second broader run launched for README/docs/NORTH_STAR/ARCHITECTURE alignment, then ended with `user_stopped` before first result row.

items.title: Sync blocker remains
items.description: Full sync is still blocked by an oversized MP4 in the `community/agentping` submodule.

props.title: community/agentping push rejected
props.content: The submodule has a local checkpoint commit `b1075f0` and is ahead of `origin/main` by one commit, but GitHub rejected the push because it includes `output/nate-substack/your-ai-agent-depends-on-six-layers-video.mp4` at 546.90 MB. Because submodule push failed, parent-repo sync intentionally stopped.

remote: error: File output/nate-substack/your-ai-agent-depends-on-six-layers-video.mp4 is 546.90 MB
remote: error: this exceeds GitHub's file size limit of 100.00 MB
! [remote rejected] main -> main (pre-receive hook declined)

props.label: NEXT MOVES
props.title: What Would Actually Move This Forward
Resume the top-docs run
props.content: Restart `docs-topdocs-20260407-omx` or launch a fresh replacement run so the remaining 10 drift checks can be burned down with evidence.

props.title: Repair sync blocker
props.content: The only hard blocker to full sync is the oversized unpublished video blob inside `community/agentping`. That requires explicit history repair or another storage strategy.

props.title: Refresh NORTH_STAR + ARCHITECTURE
props.content: The real top-level docs freshness gap now sits in `docs/NORTH_STAR.md` and `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, especially around OMC/runtime phrasing, exec profiles, and roster language.
